home.tagline: Discover, save, and follow bike routes in Salento. Works offline after you save a route.
comune.no_data: No list data for this point.
comune.no_sections: No information available for this municipality.
comune.summary_osm_note: OpenStreetMap counts within about 5 km of the municipality center.
install.modal.title: Install Salento Bike
install.prompt.lead: Tap the button to install the app and use routes offline.
install.prompt.chrome_hint: If nothing happens, use the ⋮ menu (top right) → “Install app”.
install.manual.lead: Pick your browser and follow the steps:
install.chrome_android.step1: Tap ⋮ (three dots) at the top right.
install.chrome_android.step2: Tap “Install app” or “Add to Home screen”.
install.chrome_android.step3: Confirm — the Salento Bike icon appears on your home screen.
install.chrome_android.fallback: Use an up-to-date Chrome, normal browsing (not incognito). If “Install app” is missing, restart Chrome and open this page again.
install.chrome_desktop.step1: Use the install icon in the address bar, or ⋮ → “Install Salento Bike…”.
install.chrome_ios.step1: On iOS, Safari is most reliable: ⋮ → “Open in Safari” if you’re in Chrome.
install.chrome_ios.step2: In Safari: Share □↑ → “Add to Home Screen” → “Add”.
install.firefox.step2: Tap or click “Install” or “Add to Home screen”.
install.firefox_ios.step1: ≡ → Share → “Add to Home Screen” if shown, or open in Safari and use Share → Add to Home Screen.
install.safari_ios.step1: Tap Share □↑ at the bottom (Safari toolbar).
install.safari_ios.step2: Scroll and tap “Add to Home Screen”.
install.safari_desktop.step1: File → “Add to Dock”, or Share → “Add to Dock” on newer macOS.
install.safari_desktop.step2: Alternatively install from Chrome or Edge.
install.other.step1: Open the menu (⋮ or ≡) and look for “Install app” or “Add to Home screen”.
install.other.step2: On phones, Chrome or Safari work best.
install.footer: After installing, routes you save stay available offline.
install.banner.prompt: Install the app to use routes offline.
install.banner.manual: Add Salento Bike to your Home screen for offline use.
saved.empty_hint: Open a route and tap “Save offline” to use it without a connection.
saved.title: Saved routes
saved.subtitle: Available offline. Tap to open.
